torblock-desc: Waxay u oggolaanaysaa in laga xannibo noodhadhka bixitaanka Tor inay wax ka beddelaan wiki-ga
torblock-blocked: Cinwaankaaga IP-ga, $1, si toos ah ayaa loo aqoonsaday inuu yahay noodh bixitaan Tor. Wax ka beddelka iyadoo la adeegsanayo Tor waa la xannibay si looga hortago xadgudub.
torblock-isexitnode: Cinwaanka IP-ga $1 waa la xannibay maadaama uu yahay noodh bixitaan Tor.
action-torunblocked: Ka gudub xannibaadaha otomaatiga ah ee noodhadhka bixitaanka Tor
right-torunblocked: Ka gudub xannibaadaha otomaatiga ah ee noodhadhka bixitaanka Tor
tag-tor-description: Haddii calaamaddan la dejiyo, wax ka beddel ayaa laga sameeyay noodh bixitaan Tor.
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-tor-exit-n: Haddii isbeddelka lagu sameeyay ama aan lagu samayn noodh bixitaan Tor ($1)
